summary: Photo Upload & Uniform Card Height Testing Complete - All features verified working. Backend tests passed (6/6). Frontend UI elements verified through Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/upload requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/upload returns url, file_id, path fields
Backend: GET /api/feed returns NOW_SPINNING posts correctly
Backend: NowSpinningCreate model validates photo_url field
Frontend: Collection page loads with record cards
Frontend: RecordCard title has line-clamp-2 class
Frontend: RecordCard artist has line-clamp-1 class
Frontend: RecordCard has min-h-[2.5rem] container for title
Frontend: RecordCard has min-h-[1.25rem] container for artist
Frontend: Spin Now button uses mt-auto for bottom alignment
Frontend: Now Spinning modal has 'Add a photo' button (data-testid='spin-photo-upload-btn')
Frontend: Now Spinning modal has hidden file input (data-testid='spin-photo-input')
Frontend: New Haul modal has 'Add a photo of your haul (Optional)' button
Code Review: NowSpinningCreate model in models.py has photo_url field (line 276)
Code Review: hive.py stores photo_url in post_doc (line 533)
Code Review: PostCards.js renders user-photo div when post.photo_url exists (lines 313-316)
Code Review: PostCards.js NewHaulCard renders user-photo div when image_url exists (line 373, 421)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo upload features verified working. RecordCard uniform height implemented with min-h containers and mt-auto for Spin Now button alignment. Now Spinning modal and Haul modal both have photo upload UI with data-testid attributes for testing. Feed cards render user-photo div when post.photo_url or image_url exists. The upload endpoint returns url field that can be passed to composer endpoints.

implementation: RecordCard: title in min-h-[2.5rem] container with line-clamp-2
RecordCard: artist in min-h-[1.25rem] container with line-clamp-1
RecordCard: badge row in min-h-[1.25rem] container
RecordCard: Spin Now button in flex row with mt-auto pt-1
ComposerBar: 'Add a photo' button with data-testid='spin-photo-upload-btn'
ComposerBar: hidden file input with data-testid='spin-photo-input'
ComposerBar: submitNowSpinning sends photo_url with post
Backend: NowSpinningCreate model accepts photo_url field
ComposerBar: 'Add a photo of your haul (Optional)' button
ComposerBar: submitNewHaul sends image_url with post
Backend: NewHaulCreate model accepts image_url field
PostCards.js: NowSpinningCard renders user-photo div when post.photo_url exists
PostCards.js: NewHaulCard renders user-photo div when image_url exists
User photos displayed prominently above album metadata
